Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3304-03-24
Week in Review
This week's major stories include Aegis publishing a Thargoid report based on Ram Tah's decrypted Guardian logs, revealing the two species' ancient war over territory. Professor Alba Tesreau noted humanity's situation echoes the Guardians'. Federal President Zachary Hudson and Imperial Admiral Denton Patreus rejected diplomatic options. The Socho Thargoid-clearing operation concluded successfully. Yuri Grom announced a new shipyard in CPC 20 6743 for capital ship production. Sirius Corporation announced expansion in Ceos and Sothis with new starports, settlements and megaships.
3304-03-23
Sirius Corp Announces Expansion
Sirius Corporation has announced expansion in the Ceos and Sothis systems, just outside the core systems. The company is building several new starports, settlements and megaships to support increasing traffic and provide essential services to residents and visitors.
3302-08-30
Galactic News Prospects for Malfunctioning Starports Improving
Technical personnel at New Dawn Station in the Ceos system announced that meta-alloys can now be applied twice as efficiently to counter Unknown Artefact-related interference. They identified the first week after symptoms appear as a critical window for treatment.
3301-10-15
Sirius Corporation Announces New Programme
